product.name: Lexora Solo
product.positioning: Capture every piece of legal work and turn it into a paid invoice with minimal effort.
product.target: Independent lawyers and solo practitioners in India
product.release: Controlled MVP pilot with 3-5 independent lawyers
product.duration: 8 weeks / 4 two-week sprints / 320 hours total capacity
product.workflow: Login -> Client -> Matter -> Task -> Work Capture -> Review Time -> Billable -> Invoice -> Send -> Payment -> Income and Outstanding Reports

objectives: At least 80% of pilot work entries are captured on the day performed
Median time from ready-to-bill work to sent invoice is under 10 minutes
Every sent invoice has an accurate outstanding balance and aging bucket
Zero cross-workspace access defects and zero duplicate-billing defects

sprints.goal: Create the secure solo account foundation and reliable client/matter system.
sprints.demo: Register a solo account, complete onboarding, create a client and matter, and prove workspace isolation.
sprints.exit: Authentication, workspace scoping, client CRUD and matter CRUD pass integration tests.

sprints.goal: Capture legal work from tasks, timer, manual entry, Gmail and research into one review queue.
sprints.demo: Start work from a task, stop the timer, recover an offline capture and review one unified work entry.
sprints.exit: Every supported capture source creates exactly one workspace-scoped work entry.

sprints.goal: Turn reviewed work and expenses into accurate, professional invoices.
sprints.demo: Review time, apply a rate, add an expense, generate and lock a GST invoice PDF.
sprints.exit: Ready-to-bill work cannot be billed twice; invoice totals reconcile server-side.

sprints.goal: Send invoices, record payments, report income/outstanding balances and launch the pilot safely.
sprints.demo: Send an invoice, record a partial payment, issue a receipt and verify dashboard/report balances.
sprints.exit: End-to-end regression, backups, monitoring and pilot onboarding gates pass.

branches.goal: Introduce solo product mode, focused navigation and shared UX states while hiding enterprise-only modules.
branches.screens: Focused app shell; solo navigation; fallback states; not-found and offline states
branches.backend: PRODUCT_MODE configuration; route exposure map; no schema change
branches.acceptance: Only focused MVP routes appear; excluded modules cannot be reached through navigation; loading, empty, error and retry states are reusable.
branches.verify: Frontend build; route smoke test; desktop/mobile navigation check

branches.goal: Simplify registration and login to one owner account and capture practice, tax, invoice and payment defaults during onboarding.
branches.screens: Login; register; forgot/reset password; onboarding; owner profile; practice settings
branches.backend: Auth current-user routes; workspace creation; owner profile/settings; session revocation
branches.acceptance: A lawyer registers without choosing a role, receives one workspace and can complete/edit practice settings.
branches.verify: Auth route tests; reset flow; onboarding persistence; session-expiry test

branches.goal: Enforce workspace ownership across every retained resource and migrate legacy firm records safely.
branches.screens: No new primary screen; access-denied and migration-safe error states
branches.backend: workspaceId/firmId migration; request workspace context; scoped queries; ownership validators
branches.acceptance: Workspace A cannot read or mutate Workspace B records; ownership fields cannot be supplied by clients.
branches.verify: Two-workspace security suite across clients, matters, tasks, work, invoices and payments

branches.goal: Complete client and matter records for a solo practice, including contacts, GST, billing terms, court details and financial summaries.
branches.screens: Client list/form/detail; matter list/form/detail; client balance; matter financial summary
branches.backend: Client contacts/notes; matter numbering; matter billing method; scoped summaries
branches.acceptance: Client and matter CRUD works with validation, archive/reopen, search and workspace ownership.
branches.verify: CRUD integration tests; duplicate warning; archive/reopen; summary reconciliation
branches.commit: feat(practice): complete solo clients and matters

branches.goal: Simplify tasks for one lawyer and allow any task to launch a pre-filled work session.
branches.screens: Task list; task form; task detail; My Work Today
branches.backend: Task CRUD; due/priority/checklist; meter context handoff
branches.acceptance: The owner can create, complete and filter tasks and launch the timer with client/matter/task context.
branches.verify: Task route tests; overdue filter; checklist persistence; meter handoff

branches.goal: Harden web timer and manual entry with timezone, idle, rounding, recovery and duplicate protection.
branches.screens: Work Meter; current session; session history; manual time form; recovery state
branches.backend: Work-session lifecycle; firm timezone; idempotency; recovery; work-entry projection
branches.acceptance: Start/pause/resume/stop and manual entry each create one accurate draft work entry with recoverable failure states.
branches.verify: Lifecycle tests; timezone boundaries; idle calculation; duplicate request; crash recovery
branches.commit: feat(work): harden timer and manual capture

branches.goal: Preserve differentiated Gmail and research capture while simplifying setup for one owner.
branches.screens: Extension setup/status; Gmail review; research review; capture mapping
branches.backend: Extension token; email entries; research capture; mapping and idempotent conversion
branches.acceptance: Offline captures retry safely; duplicate source references do not duplicate work; mapping updates the unified queue.
branches.verify: Extension unit tests; queue retry; duplicate capture; workspace mapping
branches.commit: feat(capture): adapt Gmail and research for solo use

branches.goal: Replace approval queues with one owner-operated work review experience.
branches.screens: Work Entries; entry edit drawer; excluded-work filter; ready-to-bill queue
branches.backend: Status adapter: draft/ready_to_bill/excluded/billed; audit history; batch actions
branches.acceptance: The owner can correct duration/narrative/matter/rate, exclude work or mark it ready to bill without approval roles.
branches.verify: State-transition tests; edit-lock rules; batch selection; legacy status migration
branches.commit: feat(work): add unified solo review queue

branches.goal: Resolve default, client and matter rates and create billables exactly once from reviewed work.
branches.screens: Rate settings; billing workbench; unbilled WIP
branches.backend: Effective rates; rate precedence; amount snapshot; idempotent billable conversion
branches.acceptance: Correct rate precedence applies; write-up/write-down needs a reason; one work entry produces no more than one billable.
branches.verify: Rate matrix tests; overlap validation; duplicate conversion; WIP totals

branches.goal: Add reimbursable legal expenses and receipt attachments to matter billing.
branches.screens: Expense list; expense form; receipt preview; matter expenses
branches.backend: Expense model/routes; categories; tax; receipt metadata; billable conversion
branches.acceptance: An expense can be created, attached to a matter, marked reimbursable and included once in an invoice.
branches.verify: Expense CRUD; receipt authorization; tax calculation; duplicate billing

branches.goal: Create a single canonical invoice flow from ready billables with numbering, GST, discounts, locking and revisions.
branches.screens: Invoice list; builder; preview; detail; void/revision dialog
branches.backend: Invoice sequence; server totals; minor-unit money; finalise/lock; revision/void
branches.acceptance: Invoice totals reconcile; finalised invoices are immutable; work/expenses cannot be invoiced twice.
branches.verify: Concurrency test; GST/rounding fixtures; lock/void/revision; duplicate invoice test

branches.goal: Produce one polished professional invoice PDF with solo-practice branding and payment instructions.
branches.screens: Invoice PDF preview; branding settings; print/download states
branches.backend: PDF/HTML generation; logo metadata; bank/UPI instructions
branches.acceptance: PDF matches invoice totals, includes required identity/tax/payment fields and renders consistently.
branches.verify: Golden PDF fixture; long-line wrapping; GST/no-GST; download authorization

branches.goal: Send finalised invoices through managed email with delivery history and retry states.
branches.screens: Send invoice dialog; delivery timeline; resend/failure state
branches.backend: Email provider adapter; delivery events; audit trail; retry
branches.acceptance: A finalised invoice sends to validated recipients and records sent/failed/delivered events without duplicate sends.
branches.verify: Provider sandbox; idempotency; failure retry; audit event

branches.goal: Support full/partial payments, reconciliation, receipts, write-offs and accurate outstanding balances.
branches.screens: Payment list/form; invoice payment panel; receipt; write-off dialog; aging view
branches.backend: Payment allocation; invoice status recompute; receipt generation; write-off audit
branches.acceptance: Partial/full payments update outstanding balances; void invoices reject payments; receipts match cleared payments.
branches.verify: Allocation tests; overpayment rule; reconciliation; write-off; receipt totals

branches.goal: Give the lawyer an actionable daily dashboard plus income, WIP, invoice and outstanding reports.
branches.screens: Dashboard; income report; outstanding/aging; time activity; CSV export
branches.backend: Dashboard summary; bounded report queries; CSV exports; data-quality warnings
branches.acceptance: Dashboard values reconcile with work, invoice and payment sources for the same filters and timezone.
branches.verify: Report reconciliation fixtures; empty states; CSV output; filter boundaries
branches.commit: feat(reports): add solo income and outstanding insights

branches.goal: Prepare a safe controlled pilot with monitoring, backups, accessibility, mobile polish and end-to-end regression.
branches.screens: Onboarding checklist; support/feedback; production error states; responsive polish
branches.backend: Health/monitoring; backup/restore; rate limits; indexes; audit review; seed/pilot tools
branches.acceptance: All release gates pass; no P0/P1 defects; backup restore works; 3-5 pilot lawyers can onboard with documented limits.
branches.verify: Full test/build/E2E; restore drill; accessibility; mobile; load smoke; pilot checklist

risks: Mandatory workspace scoping, two-workspace tests, no caller-supplied ownership
Unique indexes, idempotency keys, transactional conversion and concurrency tests
Integer minor units, server-side totals and golden fixtures
Retry queue, visible health state and manual-entry fallback
Frozen non-goals, 8-hour sprint buffer and change-control rule
Managed provider sandbox, retry and download fallback
Weekly pilot interviews, event metrics and in-product feedback
nonGoals: Automatic court feed or legal research AI
releaseGates: Workspace A cannot read or mutate Workspace B data.
Every supported capture produces at most one work entry.
Every work entry and expense can be invoiced at most once.
Invoice totals, payment allocations and reports reconcile exactly.
Finalised invoices are locked and corrections are audited.
Backup restoration, error monitoring and production health checks pass.
All retained screens have loading, empty, error and recovery states.
No P0/P1 defect remains open at pilot launch.
